---
title: "2_EEZ_wind_overlap"
author: "Caitie"
date: "2025-12-09"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(terra)
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
```

# Buffer wind areas

```{r}
buff1<-st_read(here("output_data/Wind_buffer_1km.shp"))
buff15<-st_read(here("output_data/Wind_buffer_15km.shp"))
buff25<-st_read(here("output_data/Wind_buffer_25km.shp"))
```
# Wind point locations

```{r}
wind_pts<-st_read(here("output_data/Wind_point_locations.shp"))
```

# EEZ

```{r}
eez<-st_read(here("raw_data/EEZ/eez_simple.shp")) %>% 
   st_make_valid(.) %>% 
  st_transform(., crs = "ESRI:54017")
```

# Overlap

```{r}
eez_wind1<-st_intersection(eez,buff1) %>% 
  mutate(iso3_wind_km2 = as.numeric(st_area(.)*1e-6)) %>% 
  select(rgn_key, iso3_wind_km2) %>% 
  mutate(buff = 1)

eez_wind15<-st_intersection(eez,buff15) %>% 
  mutate(iso3_wind_km2 = as.numeric(st_area(.)*1e-6)) %>% 
  select(rgn_key, iso3_wind_km2) %>% 
  mutate(buff = 15)

eez_wind25<-st_intersection(eez,buff25) %>% 
  mutate(iso3_wind_km2 = as.numeric(st_area(.)*1e-6))%>% 
  select(rgn_key, iso3_wind_km2) %>% 
  mutate(buff = 25)
```

```{r}
eez_count<-st_intersection(eez, wind_pts)

st_write(eez_count, here("output_data/Wind_pt_EEZ_intersect.shp"))

eez_count2<-eez_count %>% 
 mutate(count = 1) %>%
  group_by(rgn_key) %>% 
  summarise(num_wind = sum(count, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  select(-geometry)


write.csv(eez_count2, here("output_data/Country_offshore_wind_total_count.csv"))

#test<-read.csv(here("output_data/Country_offshore_wind_total_count.csv"))
```


# Merge all

```{r}
all_eez_wind<-rbind(eez_wind1, eez_wind15, eez_wind25) %>% 
  as.data.frame(.) %>% 
  select(-geometry)

write.csv(all_eez_wind,here("output_data/Country_offshore_wind_area.csv"))
```
